data.title: Brand Cohesion
data.description: Ensures that all visual and textual elements across microsoft.com align with Microsoft's brand identity.
data.technical_spec: Consistent use of logos, fonts, and color schemes

data.title: Innovative Leadership
data.description: Reflects Microsoft’s position as a leader in technological innovations through forward-thinking design and functionality.
data.technical_spec: Integration of AI-driven solutions, cloud-first design

data.title: Customer-Centric
data.description: Focuses on user experience and satisfaction.

data.title: Global Reach
data.description: Caters to an international audience with multilingual support and regional content variations.

data.title: Security and Trust
data.description: Emphasizes user data protection and secure transactions as core brand values.
data.technical_spec: Compliance with GDPR and other international standards
